## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Adventures Group and GrowthX to discuss content performance, tour updates, and website improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/p_LK2DqQcN-eG_YpMytxnr8Fuqcm1RfU?tab=summary&timestamp=24.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Overall clicks dropped \~3%, but Puerto Vallarta saw record clicks and steady growth](https://fathom.video/share/p_LK2DqQcN-eG_YpMytxnr8Fuqcm1RfU?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
  - [Cabo Adventures launched new Beach Club and Adventure Park experiences, requiring content updates](https://fathom.video/share/p_LK2DqQcN-eG_YpMytxnr8Fuqcm1RfU?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)
  - [New blog category structure is ready for implementation, will require re-categorizing existing content](https://fathom.video/share/p_LK2DqQcN-eG_YpMytxnr8Fuqcm1RfU?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Overview

  - [Overall clicks dropped \~3% across Cabo, Vallarta, and Cancun](https://fathom.video/share/p_LK2DqQcN-eG_YpMytxnr8Fuqcm1RfU?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
  - [Puerto Vallarta: Record clicks, steady growth](https://fathom.video/share/p_LK2DqQcN-eG_YpMytxnr8Fuqcm1RfU?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
      - [Top performers: "Things to do in October" (3% CTR), Malecón article](https://fathom.video/share/p_LK2DqQcN-eG_YpMytxnr8Fuqcm1RfU?tab=summary&timestamp=109.0)
      - [Weather articles launching, January published, February upcoming](https://fathom.video/share/p_LK2DqQcN-eG_YpMytxnr8Fuqcm1RfU?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
  - [Cabo: Increase in clicks, slight drop in impressions](https://fathom.video/share/p_LK2DqQcN-eG_YpMytxnr8Fuqcm1RfU?tab=summary&timestamp=238.0)
      - [Top performers: "Raining in Cabo" (4% CTR), shopping article](https://fathom.video/share/p_LK2DqQcN-eG_YpMytxnr8Fuqcm1RfU?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
      - [Spanish content performing well](https://fathom.video/share/p_LK2DqQcN-eG_YpMytxnr8Fuqcm1RfU?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
  - [Cancun: Drop due to Sargassum article, but still high traffic](https://fathom.video/share/p_LK2DqQcN-eG_YpMytxnr8Fuqcm1RfU?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
      - ["Drinking Age" article seeing huge impression volume](https://fathom.video/share/p_LK2DqQcN-eG_YpMytxnr8Fuqcm1RfU?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)

### Tour Updates and Content Adjustments

  - [New Beach Club experiences launched:](https://fathom.video/share/p_LK2DqQcN-eG_YpMytxnr8Fuqcm1RfU?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)
    1.  Basic access: Buffet, 3 alcoholic drinks, non-alcoholic drinks, activities
    2.  Adventure Park Pass: All activities + beach club access (no alcoholic drinks)
  - [Content updates needed for new tour structures and inclusions](https://fathom.video/share/p_LK2DqQcN-eG_YpMytxnr8Fuqcm1RfU?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)
  - [Suggestion to refresh existing "Top Things to Do" articles to include new experiences](https://fathom.video/share/p_LK2DqQcN-eG_YpMytxnr8Fuqcm1RfU?tab=summary&timestamp=1120.0)

### Website and Content Improvements

  - [Reduce Instagram embeds to max 3 per article due to loading time concerns](https://fathom.video/share/p_LK2DqQcN-eG_YpMytxnr8Fuqcm1RfU?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)
  - [New blog category structure ready for implementation:](https://fathom.video/share/p_LK2DqQcN-eG_YpMytxnr8Fuqcm1RfU?tab=summary&timestamp=1569.0)
      - [About Destination, Things to Do, Culture/Food/Heritage, Beach & Adventure](https://fathom.video/share/p_LK2DqQcN-eG_YpMytxnr8Fuqcm1RfU?tab=summary&timestamp=1598.0)
      - [Will require re-categorizing all existing blog posts](https://fathom.video/share/p_LK2DqQcN-eG_YpMytxnr8Fuqcm1RfU?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
      - [Team collaboration needed for smooth transition](https://fathom.video/share/p_LK2DqQcN-eG_YpMytxnr8Fuqcm1RfU?tab=summary&timestamp=2246.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mara to update Beach Club articles with new package details and drink inclusions](https://fathom.video/share/p_LK2DqQcN-eG_YpMytxnr8Fuqcm1RfU?tab=summary&timestamp=1058.0)
  - [Create new content series focusing on Adventure Park experiences](https://fathom.video/share/p_LK2DqQcN-eG_YpMytxnr8Fuqcm1RfU?tab=summary&timestamp=1120.0)
  - [Mara to send ticket to product team to update workflow (remove auto-bolding of titles)](https://fathom.video/share/p_LK2DqQcN-eG_YpMytxnr8Fuqcm1RfU?tab=summary&timestamp=1492.0)
  - [Saul to finalize new blog categories with Isabel before launch](https://fathom.video/share/p_LK2DqQcN-eG_YpMytxnr8Fuqcm1RfU?tab=summary&timestamp=1839.0)
  - [Team to collaborate on re-categorizing existing blog posts once new structure is live](https://fathom.video/share/p_LK2DqQcN-eG_YpMytxnr8Fuqcm1RfU?tab=summary&timestamp=2246.0)
  - [Mara to create spreadsheet with proposed categories for existing blog URLs](https://fathom.video/share/p_LK2DqQcN-eG_YpMytxnr8Fuqcm1RfU?tab=summary&timestamp=2204.0)
